data.title: Pro-XRP attorney John Deaton demands SEC transparency on Hinman’s Ether speech
data.description:
Pro-XRP attorney John Deaton has called out the SEC for holding onto the long-awaited IG report on William Hinman’s speech on Ethereum for too long.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/john-deaton-demands-sec-transparency/

data.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs break 10-day inflow streak as BTC nears worst Q1 close since 2018
data.description:
Meanwhile, spot Ethereum ETFs logged a rare day of net positive inflows, only their second for the month of March, taking in $4. 68 million.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/348765/spot-bitcoin-etfs-break-10-day-inflow-streak-as-btc-nears-worst-q1-close-since-2018?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: XRP News: SEC Could Delay Its Announcement Until August 7? Hint XRP Member!
data.description:
S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is nearing its final chapter. With both sides dropping their respective appeals, attention has now turned to what comes next
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/xrp-news-sec-could-delay-its-announcement-until-august-7-hint-xrp-member/

data.title: Bitcoin Price Slips Under $84,000 — Key Support Levels To Watch
data.description:
The Bitcoin price put in one of its strongest performances in recent times over the past week, rallying to above the $88,000 level early on. However, the premier cryptocurrency experienced a steep correction on Friday, March 28, following the latest February core inflation data. With the price of BTC now hovering beneath $84,000, panic seems to be growing in the market as investors fear further correction for the world’s largest cryptocurrency. Interestingly, the latest on-chain data show the critical support levels for the Bitcoin price
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-price-slips-under-84000-here-supporte/

data.title: Sonic Labs Drops USD Stablecoin Plans, Shifts Focus to UAE Dirham
data.description:
Sonic Labs has abandoned its plan to introduce a US dollar-pegged algorithmic stablecoin, shifting its focus to a digital asset linked to the UAE dirham.
source: https://cryptodnes.bg/en/sonic-labs-drops-usd-stablecoin-plans-shifts-focus-to-uae-dirham/

data.title: This Week in Bitcoin: GameStop Reveals Reserve, But Inflation Fears Rear Their Head
data.description:
Bitcoin was flying high earlier this week amid GameStop's reserve moves, but inflation and trade war fears torpedoed the optimism.
source: https://decrypt.co/312210/this-week-bitcoin-gamestop-reserve-inflation-fears

data.title: BitMEX Founders Arthur Hayes, Benjamin Delo, And Samuel Reed Pardoned by President Trump
data.description:
United States President Donald Trump reportedly pardoned three co-founders of the Seychelles-based crypto exchange BitMEX who had pleaded guilty to felony charges. “The co-founders, Arthur Hayes, Benjamin Delo, and Samuel Reed, previously pled guilty to a range of federal criminal charges related to money laundering and failure to police the exchange,” CNBC reported on Friday, […]
source: https://zycrypto.com/bitmex-founders-arthur-hayes-benjamin-delo-and-samuel-reed-pardoned-by-president-trump/

data.title: The future of finance is built on Bitcoin — Ethereum was just the testnet
data.description:
Opinion by: Alisia Painter, chief operating officer of Botanix LabsWithout Ethereum, the industry wouldn’t be where it is today in terms of bringing decentralized finance (DeFi) to life, making programmability a key feature of blockchains and proving the value of smart contracts at scale. The Ethereum Virtual Machine has become the go-to platform for developers, with the largest ecosystem and tooling. As DeFi matures, however, it’s worth asking: Is Ethereum the best foundation for the future of financial innovation? Well, the answer might just be Bitcoin. With nearly $6 billion in total value locked as of March 2025, Bitcoin’s decentralization, liquidity and resilience position it as the natural home for the next era of onchain finance, and while Ethereum’s flexibility has enabled an explosion of experimentation, that same flexibility has come with trade-offs
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/the-future-of-finance-is-built-on-bitcoin?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Ethereum Price Crashes Below $1,900 As $165M In Longs Get Wiped Out
data.description:
Ethereum price plunged below $1,900 on Mar. 29, erasing gains made earlier in the week and triggering widespread liquidations. Whale activity surged, while critics renewed attacks on Ether’s long-term investment appeal. The sharp decline follows nearly $165
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/29/ethereum-price-crashes-below-1900-as-165m-in-longs-get-wiped-out/
